titleStmt.title: SII 39.52: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 52. (A.R. No. 52 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL, LEFT OF ENTRANCE. •••••••••• ŚAKA 1429 (1506-07 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription states that an agreement was made between the temple authorities of Tirukkōḷakkuḍi and certain residents of Iḷaiyattakkuḍi alias Kulaśēkharapuram in Kalvāsal-nāḍu regarding the celebration of festivals and other services for the deity Śambandapperumāḷ, which they had set up in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śūbhamstu svastiśrī
cakāttam 1000 4 100 2 10 9- l mel cellā niṉ
ṟa kṣaya varuṣam Āvaṇi mātam 10 3 § puṟamalainā
ṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nayiṉār
koyiṟ ciripaṇṭārak kārittukkuk kaṭa
varom kalvācal nāṭṭu Iḷaiyāttakkuṭiyā
ṉa kulacekarapurattu ciṟuceṟṟuṭaiyāṉ pa
ḻiyarāṉ vaḻakkuṭaiyārum meṟpaṭi piḷḷaiyārum meṟpaṭi vaḻa
kkuṭaiyār Aṭiyāṟku nallār Uḷḷiṭṭārum Āvuṭaiyār Uḷḷiṭṭārum
Āka Ivvaṉaivarum Intat tirukkoyilukku campantap perumāḷ
nayinārai Eḻuntaruḷap paṇṇukaiyil Ivaṟku mañcaḷ tam
tirunāḷukkum Aṟṟaik kuṟaiyaṟuppāka tirume pūccum tiruparivaṭṭa
mum maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭavai Uṇṭāṉa ṟaikaḷum naṭatti
Ivaṟku Oṭukkum tirumālaiyum tirukkāttikaikku picātamum
kaṭṭi cantirātittavaṟ cella tanmaka naṭantu Ittirunāḷukku
Aṟṟaittirunāḷ kuṟaivaṟuppum kuṟaivaṟanaṭatti tanma
ttār vaḻakkuṭaiyāṟku canṉatiyile parivaṭṭam peṟṟu
cantirātitavaṟ cella kallilum cempilum veṭṭik ko
ḷka Ippaṭi cammatittu piṭipāṭupaṇṇikkuṭuttom
ciṟipaṇṭārak kāriyattukku kaṭavarom vaḻakkuṭaiyār Uḷḷi
ṭṭāṟku Ippaṭikku naraciṅka piramātarāyar Eḻuttu kaiyavira
cikāmaṇi Eḻuttu cuntarapāṇṭiya piramātarāyar
Eḻuttu māheśvararakṣai
Digital edition of SII 39.52 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
